repositories.prompt_note: Use the GBrain source tree and current default branch (master). GBrain is a personal knowledge brain and retrieval system (TypeScript, Bun). Review every issue and PR conservatively with the same evidence standard. Do not propose auto-close; keep everything open for maintainer triage and provide evidence-backed review comments only.

generic_fallbacks.prompt_note: Use the {target_repo} source tree and current default branch. This repository is using the generic personal-repository onboarding profile, so review conservatively and do not auto-close issues or pull requests unless a repository-specific profile later enables that policy.
